# Fixture: p5_no_reinstall
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 37.6s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Carolyn! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: The app keeps crashing and I can't see anything

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Quit the app fully and reopen it. If it keeps crashing, email support@shiftsmart.com with details about what you're seeing.
